name: Croutes Au Fromage
recipeIngredient: 6 tbsp Unsalted butter, cut into pieces
1 cup Sharp cheddar cheese, coarsely grated
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, sift together the flour, salt, and cayenne pepper.
2. Blend in the butter and Cheddar cheese until crumbly.
3. Stir in the heavy cream, stirring until the mixture forms dough.
4. Chill, wrapped in wax paper, for 2 hours.
5. Roll out dough to a thickness of 1/16-inch on a lightly floured surface.
6. Cut into rounds using a 1-1/2 inch cutter.
7. Re-roll scraps and cut out more rounds.
8. Arrange the rounds on baking sheets.
9. Brush lightly with beaten egg.
10. Bake in the middle of a preheated oven at 450°F for 5-7 minutes, or until lightly browned.
11. In a small container, cream together the Swiss cheese and softened butter.
12. Divide the cheese mixture among the rounds, bottom sides up.
13. Cover with remaining rounds, pressing lightly.
14. Bake in the preheated oven at 450°F for an additional 4 minutes, or until the cheese is just melted.
15. Makes approximately 46 croutes. A Gourmet favorite from 1969.
